Defect Description: External roof structural canopy members exhibit minor surface corrosion throughout.
Repair Description: Treat corrosion throughout externally exposed structural roof members.

Defect Description: Box gutters along perimeter of building exhibit minor corrosion at connection points to downpipes.
Repair Description: Treat corrosion at connection points to downpipes.

Defect Description: CHS steel stumps within building subfloor exhibit moderate to severe corrosion throughout.
Repair Description: Subfloor structural stumps may need to be cleaned and corrosion treated or replaced depending on % section loss.
